name: Honey-Peanut Butter Cup Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the softened butter, peanut butter, Sue Bee Honey, brown sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
2. Add eggs to the mixture, one at a time, stirring after each addition until combined.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (cocoa powder, baking soda, salt) until just mixed.
4. Stir in chopped peanut butter cups and chocolate chips.
5. Shape the dough into balls about 1 1/2 inches in diameter and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
6. Refrigerate the cookies for 2 hours before baking to allow the dough to firm up.
7. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Bake the cookies for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden around the edges and set in the center.
